_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Include Arcade Mode progression items and Arcade Mode checks.
If an Arcade Mode goal is selected, this option is forced on to keep the goal reachable.
Include Time Attack Mode progression items and Time Attack Mode checks.
If a Time Attack Mode goal is selected, this option is forced on to keep the goal reachable.
Include Survival Mode progression items and Survival Mode checks.
If a Survival Mode goal is selected, this option is forced on to keep the goal reachable.
Include Team Battle Mode progression items and Team Battle Mode checks.
Full Game Completion goals adapt to the enabled game modes.
Include Tekken Ball Mode progression items, ball items, and Tekken Ball checks.
If a Tekken Ball Mode goal is selected, this option is forced on to keep the goal reachable.
Include Tekken Force Mode progression items and Tekken Force checks.
If a Tekken Force Mode goal is selected, this option is forced on to keep the goal reachable.
Add Difficulty setting items to the item pool.
Disabled by default so players can opt in only when they want this extra setting layer.
Add Fight Count setting items to the item pool.
Disabled by default so players can opt in only when they want this extra setting layer.
Add Round Time setting items to the item pool.
Disabled by default so players can opt in only when they want this extra setting layer.
Choose how many KIFT Emblems are required for King of Iron Fist Tournament emblem goals.
KIFT Emblems are only added to the item pool when the selected goal requires them.
Controls how many KIFT Emblem items are placed compared to the required amount.
100 means only the required amount is placed. 200 means double the required amount is placed.
For example, 25 required tokens with 200 percent will place 50 KIFT Emblems in the item pool.
The final amount is capped at 100 KIFT Emblems.
